wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Lord's Parasol|2}}
{{R|Lord's Parasol||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. Upon entering a shop after obtaining this relic you immediately obtain everything the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|Merchant]] sells at no cost. This includes [[Slay the Spire 2:Cards List|cards]], [[Slay the Spire 2:Relics|relics]], [[Slay the Spire 2:Potions|potions]], and the [[Slay The Spire 2:Merchant#Card Removal Service|card removal service]]. You may not refuse anything obtained and cards will be sent straight into your deck. [[Slay the Spire 2:Potions|Potions]] will only be obtained if you have space for them, and if not they will remain available at their original price.

== Sources ==
At the start of [[Slay the Spire 2:Glory|Act 3]], Lord's Parasol can be offered by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.

== Interactions ==

=== Order ===
Shop options are purchased left to right, top to bottom. Will happen upon entering a shop tile and not upon interacting with the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|Merchant]], making it impossible to skip.

=== Synergies ===
===Relics===
* {{R|Molten Egg||2}}, {{R|Toxic Egg||2}}, and {{R|Frozen Egg||2}}: Cards of each relic's respective type will be pre-upgraded when added to the deck.
* {{R|The Courier||2}}: Lord's Parasol will purchase the entire initial [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]] inventory for free, and leave the player with a second re-stocked shop inventory that functions normally.
* {{R|Eternal Feather||2}}: Each [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]] visited will give the player seven new cards (minus 1 remove) to increment Eternal Feather.
* {{R|Fresnel Lens||2}}: Each added block card will gain the {{KW|Nimble||2}} 2 enchantment.
* {{R|Lucky Fysh||2}}: Each [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]] visited will grant 105 {{2|Gold}} due to the seven cards added.
** With {{R|Dragon Fruit||2}} this will also grant 7 Max HP per [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]].
* {{R|Potion Belt||2}} and {{R|Alchemical Coffer||2}}: Grants space for the 3 [[Slay the Spire 2:Potions|Potions]] obtained for free each [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]].

===Cards===
* {{C|Perfected Strike||2}}, {{C|Crescent Spear||2}}, and {{C|Squeeze||2}}: Will increment their damage if any of their respective cards are added from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]].
* {{C|Arsenal||2}}, and {{C|Heirloom Hammer||2}}: Can benefit from the 2 additional colourless cards added for free each [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]], which are usually more difficult to obtain.

=== Neutral ===
===Relics===
* {{R|Bing Bong||2}}: Will forcibly add 2 copies of every card from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]] into your deck.

=== Anti-Synergies ===
===Relics===
* {{R|Membership Card}}, {{R|Amethyst Aubergine||2}} and {{R|Bowler Hat||2}}: As Lord's Parsol grants everything from the [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]] at no cost, the additional {{2|Gold}} these relics provide can only be spent on certain [[Slay the Spire 2:Events|Events]], and any [[Slay the Spire 2:Potions|potion]] that could not be purchased due to lack of room. With Membership Card specifically only usable with the latter.
** With {{R|The Courier}} this will be mitigated completely and these relics will function normally on the restocked [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]].
* {{R|Maw Bank||2}}: Will forcibly break upon entering any [[Slay the Spire 2:Merchant|shop]] tile.

== Trivia ==
* A parasol (also known as an umbrella) is a type of personal implement most commonly used to protect against rain or to provide shade on sunny days. <ref>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umbrella</ref>
** The visual depiction of the Lord's Parasol seems to be a non-collapsable Umbrella that lacks a crook handle. In modern English vernacular a 'parasol' more commonly describes an older style of cloth umbrellas meant solely for providing shade, while a modern 'umbrella' typically connotes being made from a water-proof material for use in the rain. <ref>https://dictionary.cambridge.org/dictionary/english/parasol</ref>

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Lord's Parasol to the game.
